Package index

All functions

available_configs()
List Available Precomputed Configurations
comp_rmse()
Compute RMSE of Parameter Estimates using Monte-Carlo Simulations
get_sspLNIRT()
Retrieve Precomputed Sample Size Results
optim_sample()
Optimize the Minimum Sample Size using Monte Carlo Simulations
plot(<sspLNIRT>)
Plot Method for sspLNIRT Objects
plot_RA()
Plot Simulated Response Accuracy
plot_RT()
Plot Simulated Response Times
plot_estimation()
Plot Estimation Metrics by Parameter Value
plot_power_curve()
Plot Power Curve from Sample Size Optimization
print(<summary.sspLNIRT>)
Print Method for sspLNIRT Summary Objects
run_app()
Run the Shiny Application
sspLNIRT.data
Precomputed Sample Size Planning Results
scale_colour_sspLNIRT() scale_fill_sspLNIRT()
Discrete colour / fill scales for sspLNIRT plots
summary(<sspLNIRT>)
Summarise an sspLNIRT Object
theme_sspLNIRT()
sspLNIRT Plot Theme
